Team 1.overview:
Doctors: Chanda, Mundra, Leavitt, Karam   (Feb 2026, unsure of Atkinson's status) 
Exceptions:
- If Yu (Team 5) is out, do not assign Atkinson to Team 1 call (verify current status)  ( need to verify,  this probably has changed now that Wilbeck is on Team 5)
Team 1.hospitals:
- St. Thomas West
  Day call: Same physician as night call
  Night call: Handled by Team 1
- Sumner Regional
  Day call: Choma default, Molini backup (Team 4)
  Night call: Follows St. Thomas West
  Notes: If both Choma and Molini are out, Team 1 night call may act as backup (unconfirmed)

- Verify Sumner backup behavior if coverage appears unclear
